steps.title: Identify the series
steps.content: The phrase “and public squares” signals we're in a series of places.

steps.title: Apply list punctuation
steps.content:
When three items form a list with “and” joining the final item, commas separate each item. Choice D provides the comma after “libraries” to properly mark the first item in the three-item list. The other choices use wrong punctuation for list structure.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
